mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment_transaction (transaction_id, order_no, user_id, pool_card_id, amount, type, direction, status) VALUES (#{transactionId}, #{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{poolCardId}, #{amount}, #{type}, #{direction}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE payment_transaction SET status = #{status}, error_code = #{errorCode}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, balance_before = #{balanceBefore}, balance_after = #{balanceAfter}, complete_time = NOW() WHERE transaction_id = #{transactionId}
